{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103721425B8EC8C40AD86C309C"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548980224459850521","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好久没这么完整看过一本书，整体轻松幽默，大佬都很接地气甚至有点逗比，除了穿来穿去剧情有点天马行空，没有太多狗血剧情，挺好看的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757638129,"group_id":"7513857429352762430","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"......","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3oYHc0tJV0+Y5oec5pMr1c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d47f71b466294aca84d6e3479f01970d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874311&x-signature=SOOo7xkred6%2FgceVpA7BLPrZJuk%3D","user_id":"721705853268254","user_name":"惊鸿小蛮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"721705853268254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1695045892,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7513857429352762430","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书+沙雕+舔宠日常】
打工人席染穿成了霸总文里的恶毒女配。
原主作天作地坏事做尽，被阴暗疯批的反派大佬强娶。
谁知大佬是个恋爱脑，不搞囚禁不搞强制搞纯爱，被原主虐成了个瞎子。
一朝觉醒。
男人拿回反派剧本，要把刚穿过来的席染四分五裂五马分尸做成拼图。
为了活着，席染打算苟住。
连撩带哄：“老公，我想给你生八个宝宝。”
男人甩出一纸离婚协议书将她封印：“签了吧。”
席染手捧协议，胡说八道：“哇，老公，你给的婚礼策划书也太棒了吧。”
盲人老公一脸懵：他拿错文件了？
—
被离婚那天，席家二哥当晚扛着火车跑路，大哥苦着脸前来接她。
她问大哥为什么不跑。
大哥说：“我来回收豪门弃妇，顺便给你收尸。”
地狱开局的席染笑了，前世没人疼没人爱的小惨包一朝穿书还是如此。
席染当场摆烂要求大哥把她撞死。
这一撞，席妃回宫，重得“圣宠”。
谁成回的是冷宫，从少夫人变成居家保姆。
她大学毕业的让她干保姆。
狗都不干。
她干。
她一恶毒女配，让她舔疯批大佬。
狗都不舔。
她舔。
—
季斯宴每天担心被自家老婆暗害，席染每天担心被自家老公活剐。
可后来的每一天，他都在被善良朴实的全能太太治愈。
席染走完剧情准备跑路，被男人抵在房间跪舔：“老婆，一胎八宝，今晚安排。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4ddc3ecfcd1c327fa4a96cca55bbc7d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨上风月","author_id":"","book_id":"7513857429352762430","book_name":"我一恶毒女配，你让我舔疯批大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1459,"name":"攻略反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1459&name=攻略反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7513857609267413566","read_count":"743","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"254580"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"120","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,穿书,搞笑轻松,攻略反派,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4ddc3ecfcd1c327fa4a96cca55bbc7d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503841&x-signature=jXzQwV%2B4qWIE2e9msHheQKXdQw8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4446858124735976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"151"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241037
